response.justification: The candidate lacks demonstrated C++ experience at the required 8-year level and has no evidence of leading large-scale cloud compute infrastructure projects, despite extensive full-stack and open-source work; their focus is on JavaScript/TypeScript and DLang, with only brief, early-career C++ exposure, making them a poor fit for the core technical requirements.
strengths: Extensive full-stack and open-source development experience across diverse domains
Strong track record of mentoring and creating educational content (workshops, talks)
Proven ability to own and ship complex systems (e.g., GISCollective, AI-agent tooling)
concerns: No evidence of 8+ years of professional C++ programming as required
Lacks demonstrated experience in cloud compute platforms or distributed systems at scale
No record of technical leadership in cloud/DevOps engineering or architectural ownership of infrastructure
